Class Card

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Card
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public abstract class Card extends Object implements Serializable
Base type for every card in the game (tribe characters, buildings and events). Behaviour that varies per card kind is exposed as overridable methods with sensible no-op / identity defaults, so callers never need to test for the concrete subtype.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Card

      public Card(String id, Era era, int minPlayers)
      Parameters:
      id - the card's identifier
      era - the Era the card belongs to
      minPlayers - the minimum player count for this card to be in play

  • Method Details

    • addToTribe

      public abstract void addToTribe(Player player, Tribe tribe)
      Adds this card to the given tribe; each subtype routes itself to the right collection and applies its on-add side effects.
      Parameters:
      player - the owner of the tribe
      tribe - the tribe the card joins

    • validatePickable

      public void validatePickable()
      Pre-flight check before any state mutation. Unpickable cards (e.g. Events) override and throw.

    • isPickable

      public boolean isPickable()
      Non-throwing counterpart of validatePickable(), used to count pickable cards in a row.
      Returns:
      true if this card can be picked

    • isOptionalPurchase

      public boolean isOptionalPurchase()
      Returns:
      true for optional purchases (Buildings), which are never forced into a selection just to satisfy a tile's count requirement

    • getFoodCost

      public int getFoodCost()
      Returns:
      the food cost of taking this card (0 unless overridden)

    • applyPickEffect

      public void applyPickEffect(PickSimulation sim)
      Validation phase: declare how being picked at this point in the sequence affects the simulated food / builder discount / hunter count. Default: no effect.
      Parameters:
      sim - the running pick simulation

    • payPickCost

      public void payPickCost(Player player)
      Commit phase: pay food cost on the real player. Default: free.
      Parameters:
      player - the player paying for the pick

    • onRoundEndTrigger

      public void onRoundEndTrigger(Game game)
      Round-end hook: apply this card's end-of-round effect. Default: nothing.
      Parameters:
      game - the game being resolved

    • getTriggerPriority

      public int getTriggerPriority()
      Returns:
      resolution priority for end-of-round triggers; 1 means "deferred" (Sustenance)

    • survivesRoundEnd

      public boolean survivesRoundEnd()
      Returns:
      whether the card stays on the board at round end; Characters/Events are discarded by default

    • isDestroyedOnEraIII

      public boolean isDestroyedOnEraIII()
      Returns:
      whether the card is destroyed at the start of Era III

    • isEvent

      public boolean isEvent()
      Returns:
      whether this card is an Event

    • getNumStars

      public int getNumStars()
      Returns:
      the number of Shaman stars on this card; only Shaman overrides, everything else is 0

    • cardCategory

      public String cardCategory()
      Returns:
      the card macro-category for the network DTO ("CHARACTER", "BUILDING", "EVENT")

    • cardDetailType

      public String cardDetailType()
      Returns:
      the specific type within the category (e.g. CharacterType, EventType)

    • describe

      public String describe()
      Human-readable explanation of what this card does, shown by the TUI check command. Subclasses override to expose the strategic effect text without leaking model internals.
      Returns:
      a description of the card's effect

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns:
      the card's identifier

    • getEra

      public Era getEra()
      Returns:
      the Era the card belongs to

    • getMinPlayers

      public int getMinPlayers()
      Returns:
      the minimum player count for this card to be in play
